The Work

Quiet precision, learned at the bench.

For more than 10 years, Roberto "The Setter" has dedicated his career to mastering the art of diamond setting.

After spending 8 years working alongside some of the industry's most respected jewelers in New York City's renowned 47th Street Diamond District, followed by several years refining his craft in Miami, Florida, Roberto developed the precision, consistency, and attention to detail that define exceptional craftsmanship.

Over the years, he has perfected his skills across a wide range of jewelry, including engagement rings, pendants, fine jewelry, watches, chains, bracelets, and custom pieces, treating every project with the same level of care and expertise.

Today, Roberto proudly serves clients throughout the DMV area and beyond. If you're in the DMV or New Jersey, there's no need to send your jewelry to New York or Miami for expert stone setting. World-class craftsmanship is available closer to home.

Every piece entrusted to Roberto is completed with precision, patience, and a commitment to excellence, ensuring the finished work speaks for itself.

Contact

Custom diamond setting by appointment.

ROV Jewelry serves the DMV area and accepts nationwide work through insured shipping. For appointments, custom setting inquiries, and shipping instructions, contact Roberto directly.
